en: Can we just take a second to appreciate the beating Boba took after his bath was interrupted by the Wookiee?
Strangled out of the bathtub and thrown across the floor, lifted then slammed, launched across the room into his jetpack,
gets absolutely belted across the face by electrified brass knuckles, slapped across the room, bitten on the hand,
then squeezed until his bones crack. You can even hear them crack.
Whacked in the face and slammed into the side of the bathtub.
And then, after the Wookiee's been trapped and the action's over, Boba walks in wearing his bathrobe looking fresh like nothing happened.
Mate, forget Obi-Wan, Boba Fett has the thickest plot armor in all of Star Wars.
I mean, he basically has cancer from spending too long in the Sarlacc pit.
And a couple days later, he's taken out four armed beasts in the middle of the desert after he's had no food, no nothing.
